text:
TIL: .NET 11 Preview 4 ships an MCP Server template right in the SDK.

dotnet new mcpserver

Scaffolds a Model Context Protocol server. No extra packages to find, no boilerplate to copy. Create and start adding your tools.
name: Gerald Versluis

text:
The Svelte team just launched official AI tools.

They built an MCP server, custom skills, and subagents to fix common LLM coding mistakes.

If you use AI to write Svelte, your setup is now outdated.

text:
AI agents are getting memory. But if that local context or history is tampered with behind the scenes... how would you know? 🔍

I built verifiable-memory-mcp: a local-first Model Context Protocol server that adds an integrity layer to agent memory. (1/3)
name: manuel señorans
